  }
  \par\smallskip\footnotesize \emph{Note:} Overall ordering uses the generated directional score: the mean of productivity, representative quality, risk control, and administrative feasibility. Yield is welfare per submitted proposal, so systems do not receive the same interpretation for merely blocking most bills. Block dep. is pre-floor blockage reliance. Case half-ranges are descriptive variation across campaign cases, not statistical confidence intervals. Cell shading is oriented by the column arrow: green is more favorable and red is less favorable. Red label text marks the stylized U.S.-like conventional benchmark.
\end{table*}
